Business rule Source Sytem Datetime Format Yyyymmdd Hh:mi:ss

Card of business rule Source Sytem Datetime Format Yyyymmdd Hh:mi:ss

Name

Source Sytem Datetime Format Yyyymmdd Hh:mi:ss

Code

SOURCE_SYTEM_DATETIME_FORMAT_YYYYMMDD_HH_MI_SS

Rule Type

Definition


Server expression of the business rule Source Sytem Datetime Format Yyyymmdd Hh:mi:ss

please convert datetime stored as varchar to timestamp using the following format yyyyMMdd HH:mi:ss
